isolation.policy: read-only against all live sources/controllers/checkpoints/providers/leases; writes only on the research branch; no merge to main; hawking-packs not recreated; Frontier untouched

fleets.name: hide-live-audit
fleets.purpose: read-only reconciliation of every historical claim against current code with file:line evidence

fleets.name: claude-code-cleanroom
fleets.purpose: 11 facet scouts each independently adversarially verified; cited parity targets with evidence labels

fleets.name: hide-spec-drafting
fleets.purpose: drafted the self-contained specs grounded in the archaeology + parity artifacts

fleets.name: hide-adversarial-verify
fleets.purpose: falsify supremacy + parity claims, re-verify archaeology against live code, test the handoff falsification targets, audit internal consistency

evidence_discipline.clean_room: behavioral contracts, workflow patterns, configuration shapes, short functional labels only; no proprietary source, assets, or branding; HIDE uses its own names, voice, and visual doctrine
house_rules_enforced: no em or en dashes (0 across the package)
no commit/push without explicit approval (the campaign prompt authorizes a research branch push after verification)

key_reconciliations: TWO distinct packs: hawking-packs ABSORBED+RETIRED into hawking-seed-c (do not recreate) vs hawking-hide-desktop STILL SEALED (13 crates, git-only recovery)
CORRECTION to handoff: the offline sealed-archive path is GONE from disk; git 5a99d0e2 is the only lifeline
the production vertical slice is still broken (FE targets /v1/hide/* on 8744 = packed hide-serve; live hawking-serve serves a disjoint surface on 8080, no /v1/hide/*, no state routes)
the 'pass state, not text' moat is real-but-unwired: RwkvState fork/serialize byte-exact + tested, no HTTP/CLI caller; GPU->CPU readback missing; no transformer capsule
all five facade claims (S1-S5) CONFIRMED at git 5a99d0e2; the packed harness is the highest-value reintegration target
CORRECTED prior memory: packs absorption is committed (not designed/uncommitted); deletion 20/20; packs retired at 4fbca8bc
known_limits: clean-room web claims are as-of 2026-07-19; Claude Code changes weekly (verifiers caught several stale/overclaimed sub-claims, all downgraded or corrected)
supremacy advantages are mostly real-but-unwired primitives; every claim is gated on its build item; nothing is presented as shipped
local-model judgment quality is blocked_on_model (a capable local coder), which the package states rather than papers over
apply_patch correctness (hide-tools base_hash optimistic concurrency) flagged as an open probe, not verified here
GPU->CPU recurrent readback cost is unmeasured (the first hard gate on the state moat)

verification_outcome.archaeology: all 7 load-bearing claims CONFIRMED against live code; 1 internal contradiction found and fixed (crate-member count)
verification_outcome.supremacy: all 6 handoff falsification targets held; the package correctly FALSIFIES the naive claims and frames the open ones with kill criteria; 2 sharpenings applied (2.2 air-gap scope, 2.5 affinity gate)
verification_outcome.parity: attempts to falsify the DOCUMENTED Claude Code claims all FAILED; 2 label fixes applied (hooks.lifecycle->absent, component-name traceability)
verification_outcome.hawking_fit: all 9 reintegration targets verified in packed source; readiness labels consistent; minor citation nits noted
verification_outcome.consistency_material_issue_resolved: verifier found 123 em/en dashes across 10 files (a house-rule violation missed by a broken BSD-grep check); all stripped, 0 remain; the final report is now authored; README manifest sealed
residual_nits_accepted: context-OS cites a debug_assert as a hard invariant (compiled out in release)
'~44 GenerateRequest sites' quoted from a stale in-code comment; true count ~38-41
json_mode:false forcing should cite http.rs/scheduler.rs, not driver.rs (driver.rs:52-110 correctly shows no constraint on the batched decode)
sibling docs cite slightly divergent line ranges for the same RWKV features
